messages.content: Welcome to support. What can I help you with?
messages.name: Assistant

messages.content: My last invoice was charged twice.
messages.name: You

messages.content: I'm sorry about that. Let me pull up your billing history and check the duplicate charge.
messages.name: Assistant

messages.content: Found it. I've issued a refund for the duplicate; it should appear in three to five business days.
messages.name: Assistant
